title: vernonia baldwinii subsp. interior
intro: Vernonia baldwinii subsp. interior, also known as the interior ironweed, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Vernonia baldwinii subsp. interior include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
